ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_number" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "contact_last_name" TEXT /* Customer's last name of contact person */,
  "contact_first_name" TEXT /* Customer's first name of contact person */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Customer's phone number */,
  "address_line1" TEXT /* First line of customer's address */,
  "address_line2" TEXT /* Second line of customer's address (optional) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the customer is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the customer is located */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of customer's address */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the customer is located */,
  "sales_rep_employee_number" INTEGER /* ID of the sales representative assigned to the customer */,
  "credit_limit" REAL /* Credit limit assigned to the customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Customer's age */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Customer's gender */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Customer's occupation */,
  "loyalty_program_status" TEXT /* Customer's loyalty program status */,
  "preferred_communication_method" TEXT /* Customer's preferred communication method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_number" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_number" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "required_date" TEXT /* Date when the order is required by */,
  "shipped_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was shipped */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., Shipped, Pending) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments related to the order */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "subtotal" REAL /* Subtotal of the order */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied to the order */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount applied to the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_number FOREIGN KEY ("customer_number") REFERENCES customers ("customer_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_representatives" (
  "employee_number" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales representative */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the sales representative */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the sales representative */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the sales representative */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the sales representative */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the sales representative's manager */,
  "manager_employee_number" INTEGER /* Employee number of the sales representative's manager */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the sales representative operates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Selling price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity in stock for the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_number" INTEGER /* Reference to the order to which the item belongs */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "price" REAL /* Selling price of the product at the time of order */,
  "subtotal" REAL /* Subtotal for the order item */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied to the order item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_number FOREIGN KEY ("order_number") REFERENCES orders ("order_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping record */,
  "order_number" INTEGER /* Reference to the order being shipped */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was shipped */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Address where the order is shipped */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost associated with the shipping */,
  "shipping_carrier" TEXT /* Shipping carrier used for the order */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_order_number FOREIGN KEY ("order_number") REFERENCES orders ("order_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_number" INTEGER /* Reference to the order for which the payment was made */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was processed */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of money paid */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_method_details" TEXT /* Details of the payment method (e.g., card number, expiration date) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID for the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_number FOREIGN KEY ("order_number") REFERENCES orders ("order_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "discounts" (
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discount */,
  "discount_description" TEXT /* Description of the discount */,
  "discount_value" REAL /* Value of the discount (percentage or fixed amount) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the discount */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the discount */,
  "discount_type" TEXT /* Type of discount (e.g., percentage, fixed amount) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discount_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_discounts" (
  "product_discount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product discount mapping */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product that has a discount */,
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the discount applied to the product */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the product discount */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the product discount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_discount_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_discounts_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_discounts_discount_id FOREIGN KEY ("discount_id") REFERENCES discounts ("discount_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "order_number" INTEGER /* Reference to the order associated with the feedback */,
  "customer_number" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer providing feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was given */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5 scale) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the customer regarding their experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_feedback_customer_number FOREIGN KEY ("customer_number") REFERENCES customers ("customer_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_feedback_order_number FOREIGN KEY ("order_number") REFERENCES orders ("order_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference entry */,
  "customer_number" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who set the preference */,
  "preference_type" TEXT /* Type of preference (e.g., newsletter subscription, product notifications) */,
  "preference_value" TEXT /* Value of the preference (e.g., true/false, specific product categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_preferences_customer_number FOREIGN KEY ("customer_number") REFERENCES customers ("customer_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend entry */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date of the analysis */,
  "total_orders" INTEGER /* Total number of orders placed on that date */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales made on that date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_trends_order_date FOREIGN KEY ("order_date") REFERENCES orders ("order_date")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "quantity_on_hand" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the product in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Minimum level at which to reorder the product */,
  "last_restock_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was last restocked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
